title: Toss Up!
description: Adds a new Mace enchantment that knocks a player into the air when hitting the ground
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e49e52914b4664ea208316aff5eddcb752d0164.png)

# ❔ About
This datapack add a new enchantment for Mace - **"Toss Up"** - that tosses the player into the air when hitting the ground together with a hitted block.  
- Every toss spends 10 durability.  
- Enchantment can be found like as any other vanilla enchantments (Enchanting Table, Villagers etc.).  
- **(!)** Enchantment only works in Survival/Adventure mode.
- Tossed block can be hitted and thrown into mobs, dealing **(3 * (level + 1))** damage. **(v1.1)**

<details>
<summary>Demonstration</summary>

![Demonstration](https://i.imgur.com/jqqB00Y.gif)

</details>



# 💿 Installation
This datapack is installed like any other.  

# 🛠️ Compatibility
✅ This datapack should work in multiplayer and will work with most datapacks.

# 📨 Feedback
If you have ideas for improving the datapack (both from the content and from the technical side), please open issue on github or message me in Discord.
